title: Pumpkin — variety-driven spacing and harvest timing
body: HORDI prescribes variety-specific spacing for pumpkin because days-to-harvest differs dramatically between types. Local strains plant at 3 × 3 m and are harvested 60 days after flowering. A.N.K. plants tighter at 2.5 × 2.5 m and is picked 40 days after flowering. Butternut is essentially a trellis / dense-bed crop at 50 × 100 cm and is ready 20 days after flowering. All three share the same basal of 220 Urea + 380 TSP + 125 MOP (kg/ha) plus two light top-dressings of 45 Urea + 25 MOP at 4 and 8 weeks. Planting at the wrong spacing for the variety halves effective yield because competition for light and moisture pulls down fruit set.

body_translated.en: HORDI prescribes variety-specific spacing for pumpkin because days-to-harvest differs dramatically between types. Local strains plant at 3 × 3 m and are harvested 60 days after flowering. A.N.K. plants tighter at 2.5 × 2.5 m and is picked 40 days after flowering. Butternut is essentially a trellis / dense-bed crop at 50 × 100 cm and is ready 20 days after flowering. All three share the same basal of 220 Urea + 380 TSP + 125 MOP (kg/ha) plus two light top-dressings of 45 Urea + 25 MOP at 4 and 8 weeks. Planting at the wrong spacing for the variety halves effective yield because competition for light and moisture pulls down fruit set.
body_translated.si: අස්වැන්න ලබා ගැනීමට ගතවන දින ගණන ප්‍රභේද අතර සැලකිය යුතු ලෙස වෙනස් වන නිසා HORDI වට්ටක්කා සඳහා ප්‍රභේදයට විශේෂිත පරතර නියම කරයි. දේශීය ප්‍රභේද 3 × 3 m පරතරයේ වගාකර පිපීමෙන් දින 60 කින් අස්වනු ගනියි. A.N.K. 2.5 × 2.5 m වැනි වඩා සමීප පරතරයක රෝපණය කරයි; පිපීමෙන් දින 40 කින් අස්වනු. Butternut 50 × 100 cm ආධාරක/ඝන ඇඳලි බෝගයකි; පිපීමෙන් දින 20 කින් සූදානම්. තුනම එකම මූලික පොහොර හවුල් කරයි: 220 යූරියා + 380 TSP + 125 MOP (kg/ha) සහ සති 4 සහ 8 දී ලඝු මතුපිට පොහොර දෙකක්: 45 යූරියා + 25 MOP. වැරදි පරතරයක වැවීමෙන් අස්වැන්න අඩවක් දක්වා පහත වැටේ.
body_translated.ta: வகைகளுக்கிடையில் அறுவடை நாட்கள் மிகவும் வேறுபடுவதால் HORDI பரங்கிக்காய்க்கு வகை-குறிப்பிட்ட இடைவெளியை பரிந்துரைக்கிறது. உள்ளூர் வகைகள் 3 × 3 m இடைவெளியில் நடப்பட்டு பூக்கும் 60 நாட்களில் அறுவடை செய்யப்படுகின்றன. A.N.K. 2.5 × 2.5 m இல் நெருக்கமாக நடப்பட்டு பூக்கும் 40 நாட்களில் பறிக்கப்படுகிறது. Butternut அடிப்படையில் தாங்கி / அடர்ந்த பாத்தி பயிர் 50 × 100 cm இல் பூக்கும் 20 நாட்களில் தயார். மூன்றும் ஒரே அடிப்படை உரத்தை பகிர்ந்து கொள்கின்றன: 220 யூரியா + 380 TSP + 125 MOP (kg/ha) மற்றும் 4 மற்றும் 8 வாரங்களில் இரண்டு இலேசான மேல்-உரங்கள்: 45 யூரியா + 25 MOP. வகைக்கு தவறான இடைவெளியில் நடுதல் மகசூலை பாதியாக குறைக்கும்.

quote: Local Strain: 3 × 3m; A.N.K.: 2.5 × 2.5m; Butternut: 50 × 100cm. Harvest Timing — A.N.K.: 40 days after flowering; Local Variety: 60 days after flowering; Butternut: 20 days after flowering.
